channel.title: City Record Digest
channel.description: Notable NYC government notices — procurement, hearings, rules, and more

item.title: Paper, Multipurpose - CENTRAL STOREHOUSE
item.description:
$8.5M award by Citywide Administrative Services to WB Mason Co., Inc.. Large procurement worth tracking for scope and competitiveness.
Citywide Administrative Services | Procurement | $8.5M

item.title: EMERGENCY EXECUTIVE ORDER No. 2.15
item.description:
Emergency executive order No. 2.15 from the Mayor. Executive orders carry the force of law and can reshape city policy, agency operations, and enforcement priorities.
Office of the Mayor | Special Materials

City Planning | Special Materials
